rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN SCHIEFER ET AL VS. SEQUOIA MORTGAGE CAPITAL, INC. A CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, January 23, 2015 line 6. DEFENDANTS SEQUOIA MORTGAGE CAPITAL, INC. A CALIFORNIA and SEQUOIA MORTGAGE FUND, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to amend for plaintiffs to (1) allege in good faith facts explaining the inconsistency between allegations in complaint and First Amended Complaint, paragraphs 14; (2) to allege in good faith facts supporting Plaintiff's understanding that the loan was to be primarily personal (See Opposition 2:20-22). Request for Judicial Notice of the Note is DENIED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID RUFFMAN ET AL VS. WAI KING HO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, January 23, 2015 line 8. DEFENDANTS WAI HO, CELINE HO, LIANG MEI ZHU HO and MICHAEL ZHU HO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege the amount of economic losses and consequential damages claimed in the complaint. Damages re: mental and emotional distress, physical injury are sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS LAUDERBACH VS. KATHRYN KAIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Renewed Motion To Compel Plaintiff Thomas Lauderbach'S To Provide Discovery Responses, Documents And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, January 23, 2015 line 13. Defendant Kathryn Kain's Amended Notice Of Renewed Motion To Compel To Provide Discovery Responses, Documents And For Sanctions DENIED, untimely. Responses served June 16, 2014; Automatic Stay June 27, 2014; automatic stay lifted November 12, 2014; Motion filed January 8, 2014. No evidence provided regarding stipulation to extend time to file the motion beyond 45 days provided by statute. Additionally, Defendant's counsel shall address the issue of disclosure of Defendant's and non-party's social security numbers in publicly available court records. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SALLY LIU VS. CHADWICK HOWARD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, January 23, 2015 line 9. PLAINTIFF SALLY LIU's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PHILLIP ELISSETCHE, SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF THE VS. MARIE T HUERTAS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, January 23, 2015 line 10. DEFENDANT MARIE HUERTAS' Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint DENIED, 5 days to respond. Unlawful Detainer based on termination of license is sufficiently alleged. The Court has jurisdiction. Motion to Quash is not a proper vehicle for determination of defendant's status as a licensee or a tenant. = (501/REQ)
